context.usage: Spawned during drag-to-feed; can be reused in eating frames.

shape_notes: 3x3 blob with exactly 1 darker pixel (#AB5236) for depth.

acceptance_criteria: PNG is exactly 3x3px with transparent background.
Contains 8 pixels of #FFEC27 and 1 pixel of #AB5236.
No anti-aliasing; nearest-neighbor scaling preserves crisp edges.

reference_images.label: seed_object_doc
reference_images.purpose: Seed shape, bowl fill states, and feed interaction prop anchor.

reference_images.label: care_system_doc
reference_images.purpose: Feed, clean, and pet interaction timing plus UI icon anchor.

reference_images.label: echo_object_doc
reference_images.purpose: Cockatiel body proportion, crest, cheek patch, and state silhouette anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle for obstacles asset loading with nearest-neighbor sampling and deterministic z-order.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/seed_item_3x3.png through AssetServer and store the handle under seed_item_3x3.
runtime_notes: Spawn care props and particles as separate entities so feed, clean, and pet logic can toggle visibility without atlas mutation.
Register manifest execution_order in a startup resource so build order stays deterministic during content validation.
Read frame size and bounds from specs.dimensions_px rather than texture metadata during runtime checks.
